pkgmetadata.longdescription: pyknp Python Module for JUMAN++KNPJUMAN++(JUMAN)KNPPython (Python23) Requirements- Python - Verified Versions 2.7.15, 3.7.11- [JUMAN++](httpnlp.ist.i.kyoto-u.ac.jpindex.phpJUMAN++) [[EN](httpnlp.ist.i.kyoto-u.ac.jpENindex.phpJUMAN++)](or [JUMAN](httpnlp.ist.i.kyoto-u.ac.jpindex.phpJUMAN)[[EN](httpnlp.ist.i.kyoto-u.ac.jpENindex.phpJUMAN)]) - JUMAN++ JUMAN- [KNP](httpnlp.ist.i.kyoto-u.ac.jpindex.phpKNP) [[EN](httpnlp.ist.i.kyoto-u.ac.jpENindex.phpKNP)] Installation pip install pyknp Documentshttpspyknp.readthedocs.ioenlatest AuthorsContact (contactnlp.ist.i.kyoto-u.ac.jp)- John Richardson, Tomohide Shibata, Yuta Hayashibe, Tomohiro Sakaguchi
